svg.text: proxxx — incident lockdown · freeze every write, fleet-wide
# maintenance window — freeze every write across the fleet, then work safely
# any mutation now — yours or a teammate's — is refused at the door
refusing mutation — the fleet is FROZEN (reason:
rotating cluster API tokens, since 1782851646). Run
freeze, or wait for the TTL to expire.
# maintenance done — lift the freeze, writes flow again
